label: MAX Messenger
description: MAX messenger channel plugin for OpenClaw Gateway

dmPolicy.description: Who can send DMs: open=all, pairing/allowlist=allowFrom list only, closed/disabled=nobody

allowFrom.description: Allowed MAX user IDs (when dmPolicy is pairing or allowlist)

webhookUrl.description: Public HTTPS URL where MAX will POST events (optional, uses long polling if not set)

webhookSecret.description: Secret to validate X-Max-Bot-Api-Secret header from MAX

webhookPath.description: Local HTTP path to register for the webhook (default: /max/webhook)
